title: WEFT Annotation — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Annotation. Extends the base Annotation schema with private PDF binding, smart reader version, PDF integrity hash, and Ravelry app-data sync.

ravelry.description: Ravelry project ID these annotations belong to

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Annotation. This is Stash2Go's core differentiator — the smart pattern reader.

private_pdf_id.description: Stash2Go private PDF entity ID this annotation set is bound to.

smart_reader_version.description: Version of the smart reader engine that created/last updated these annotations (e.g., '2.0').

knitting_mode.description: Feature level: basic (markers/counters only), smart (+ chart detection), full (all smart features).

pdf_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the PDF file, used to verify annotations match the correct PDF version.

pdf_page_count.description: Number of pages in the PDF (for validation).

marker_storage_version.description: Storage format version for markers (React Native marker format).

ravelry_app_data_key.description: Key used to store/retrieve annotation data in Ravelry App Data API.

chart_sensitivity.description: Detection sensitivity threshold for automatic chart detection.

device_id.description: Device that last modified these annotations.
